Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Is this... the deepest part of the Abyss of Time...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You think so? Looks the same as everywhere else to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It would make sense, considering the path we've taken.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}And that means the source of the Abyss, and therefore the time loop, should be here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh, I almost forgot! Speaking of the Abyss...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I found something in those notes about it that I mentioned earlier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}They said that this place came to be as a reaction to the creation of Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Yes, because a giant tower appeared out of nowhere, it ended up leaving a massive hollow in its place—that's the Abyss.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}So they've known about this place for ten years?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}They thought that it would be harmless if left alone, and that it would probably disappear when Tartarus did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But the notes also said that since the Abyss is just a byproduct of Tartarus, there shouldn't be any Shadows in it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 7 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Seriously!? Uh, counterpoint: there's a shitload of Shadows here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}And if it was supposed to go poof along with Tartarus, then why're we standin' in it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}They forget a decimal place or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But some kind of force prevented it from vanishing, so the other side's disappearance caused an imbalance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Who knows? Maybe it's down here somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}But one thing's for certain: it's deeply connected to all of you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}The hell's up with that!? What'd we do to deserve this!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}So whatever's past that could be what's causing all this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}If we leave out Aigis, Metis, and me... Whose past is left?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Yeah... Gotta be someone else with a "reason" for their power, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Well, there's no point wasting time thinking about it. It's literally right there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Let's just open it, then we'll know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Whatever the cause is, it's strong enough to keep the Abyss of Time from disappearing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}And we'll be trying to destroy it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}We could be in for a battle. We should make sure we're prepared for that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}This is where we aim to settle everything...[n]{f 1 1}
